UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Sam Maeki.
Attorney Margaret DeMatteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cheryl Pouncy is present.
Attorney Holly McHugh representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-14-2013 is vacated.

UD JURY TRIALS
